events.label: reasoning
events.text:
我们被要求评估一个热工场景。场景描述：“Pre-task photos for Hot work show the exposure area set up with the planned guards, access control, and crew protection in place. The daily briefing form is signed and no active exposure is visible. Reference material on hand: NFPA 51B, OSHA 1926 Subpart J.” 这是一个现场检查吗？工作阶段是“in-progress”。场景似乎显示准备工作已完成，照片显示防护设施、进入控制和人员保护已就位，每日简报表格已签署，没有可见的暴露。这看起来像是热工开始前的安全检查。应该没有问题，条件看起来安全。但是我们需要评估，并生成JSON。注意：如果工作危险或不合规，则decision必须为fail。这里似乎没有危险，decision应该是pass。风险应为低。工作阶段是in-progress吗？场景说“Stage of the work when observed: in-progress”，但描述说“Pre-task photos ... set up with planned guards ... daily briefing form signed and no active exposure is visible”，这可能意味着他们已经准备就绪，但工作尚未开始。也许这是“staged”阶段，因为还没有真正的热工活动。但是指令说“work_stage”是工作进展的程度，并且给定的阶段是“in-progress”，所以我们用“in-progress”。组件条件没有提到任何缺陷，所以component_conditions为空。百分比完成可能约为10%或20%，因为准备就绪但未开始实际热工。value、sound_source等不需要。findings可以写“Pre-task setup complies with NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926 requirements; guards, access control, crew protection in place, briefing signed.” actions: "No immediate action required; proceed with hot work.” rationale: “All required controls are in place and documented.” references: “NFPA 51B, OSHA 1926 Subpart J”。置信度高，比如0.95。

因此，answer.json应该包含这些。

注意：输出格式必须是一个有效的JSON对象，没有其他文本。我们将直接输出JSON。

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "pass",
  "risk": "low",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": [],
  "percent_complete": 20,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Pre-task setup complies; guards, access control, crew protection in place",
    "Daily briefing form signed",
    "No active exposure visible"
  ],
  "actions": ["Proceed with hot work under existing controls"],
  "rationale": "All required controls per NFPA 51B and OSHA 1926 Subpart J are in place and documented. No hazard present.",
  "references": ["NFPA 51B", "OSHA 1926 Subpart J"]
}
